forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -0,0 +1,28 @@
+---
+assignees:
+- claude-code
+depends_on:
+- 01KT6SAXCBZFE6S0DEPZDJSQAA
+position_column: todo
+position_ordinal: '8580'
+project: short-ids
+title: 'Short IDs: CM6 — render ^<short> in bodies as task pills'
+---
+Parse `^<7chars>` inside CM6 editor/display bodies and decorate them as task pills showing the task title (clipped), reusing the existing generic pill renderer.
+
+## Background (from scoping)
+- Generic pill stack already exists and is prefix-parameterized: `cm-mention-decorations.ts` (ViewPlugin + Decoration.replace/mark + atomicRanges), `cm-mention-widget.ts` (`MentionWidget`, renders `${prefix}${clipDisplayName(displayName)}`), `mention-finder.ts` (`findMentionsInText(text, prefix, slugs)` — literal prefix+slug match against a known-slug list), `mention-meta.ts`.
+- The editable task description mounts at `components/fields/registrations/markdown.tsx` via `useMentionExtensions()` (no opts); read-only display at `fields/displays/markdown-display.tsx`. Today the task metaMap there is title-slug-keyed, so inline `^` task pills don't resolve.
+
+## Scope
+- Feed the task metaMap (short-id-keyed, from short-ids-mention-identity) into the description editor + display so `^<short>` decorates.
+- Ensure `findMentionsInText` matches a fixed-width Crockford-base32 short id after `^` (verify the boundary regex `[\w-]` and the fenced-code/inline-code/heading skips hold for a 7-char id).
+- `MentionWidget` resolves short id → task title for the pill label; unknown short id falls back to muted raw text (existing behavior).
+- Confirm `depends_on` field pills (already id-resolved via `MentionView`) still render and, ideally, now display `^<short>` consistently.
+
+## Acceptance
+- Typing/pasting `^8rfp1r` in a task description renders a pill showing the task's title; caret-adjacent reverts to raw editable `^8rfp1r`.
+- Read-only markdown display renders the same pill.
+- Unknown short id shows muted raw text, no crash.
+
+Depends on short-ids-mention-identity.
\ No newline at end of file

forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -8,21 +8,23 @@
 project: short-ids
 title: 'Short IDs: CM6 — render ^<short> in bodies as task pills'
 ---
-Parse `^<7chars>` inside CM6 editor/display bodies and decorate them as task pills showing the task title (clipped), reusing the existing generic pill renderer.
+Parse `^`-references inside CM6 editor/display bodies and decorate them as task pills showing the task title (clipped), reusing the existing generic pill renderer. Resolves BOTH short (`^8rfp1r`) and full-ULID (`^01KT4CNAYW7JG0X8F8W28RFP1R`) forms; display normalizes both to `^<short>`.

 ## Background (from scoping)
 - Generic pill stack already exists and is prefix-parameterized: `cm-mention-decorations.ts` (ViewPlugin + Decoration.replace/mark + atomicRanges), `cm-mention-widget.ts` (`MentionWidget`, renders `${prefix}${clipDisplayName(displayName)}`), `mention-finder.ts` (`findMentionsInText(text, prefix, slugs)` — literal prefix+slug match against a known-slug list), `mention-meta.ts`.
 - The editable task description mounts at `components/fields/registrations/markdown.tsx` via `useMentionExtensions()` (no opts); read-only display at `fields/displays/markdown-display.tsx`. Today the task metaMap there is title-slug-keyed, so inline `^` task pills don't resolve.
+- `depends_on` (full ULIDs) already renders as pills via `MentionView` — inline body matching must stay consistent with it.

 ## Scope
-- Feed the task metaMap (short-id-keyed, from short-ids-mention-identity) into the description editor + display so `^<short>` decorates.
-- Ensure `findMentionsInText` matches a fixed-width Crockford-base32 short id after `^` (verify the boundary regex `[\w-]` and the fenced-code/inline-code/heading skips hold for a 7-char id).
-- `MentionWidget` resolves short id → task title for the pill label; unknown short id falls back to muted raw text (existing behavior).
-- Confirm `depends_on` field pills (already id-resolved via `MentionView`) still render and, ideally, now display `^<short>` consistently.
+- Match `^` references by SHAPE, not by enumerating a slug list: `^` followed by exactly 26 OR exactly 7 Crockford-base32 chars, longest-first (26 before 7), with the existing boundary guards (`[\w-]` neighbors) and fenced-code/inline-code/heading skips. Verify these hold for fixed-width ids.
+- Normalize a matched 26-char full ULID to its last-7 short id, then resolve against the single short-id-keyed task metaMap (from short-ids-mention-identity). This keeps the metaMap keyed only by short id while accepting both widths — no doubling.
+- `MentionWidget` renders the pill as `^<short>` + task title for BOTH input forms (a pasted full ULID displays as the short pill). Unknown id (shape matches, resolution misses) falls back to muted raw text (existing behavior), no crash.
+- Feed the short-id-keyed task metaMap into the description editor + read-only display.
+- Confirm `depends_on` field pills still render and now display `^<short>` consistently.

 ## Acceptance
-- Typing/pasting `^8rfp1r` in a task description renders a pill showing the task's title; caret-adjacent reverts to raw editable `^8rfp1r`.
-- Read-only markdown display renders the same pill.
-- Unknown short id shows muted raw text, no crash.
+- Typing/pasting `^8rfp1r` OR `^01KT4CNAYW7JG0X8F8W28RFP1R` in a task description renders a pill showing the task's title, displayed as `^<short>`; caret-adjacent reverts to the raw editable token.
+- Read-only markdown display renders the same pill for both forms.
+- Unknown id (right shape, no match) shows muted raw text, no crash.

 Depends on short-ids-mention-identity.
\ No newline at end of file

+Parse `^<7chars>` inside CM6 editor/display bodies and decorate them as task pills showing the task title (clipped), reusing the existing generic pill renderer.

 ## Background (from scoping)
 - Generic pill stack already exists and is prefix-parameterized: `cm-mention-decorations.ts` (ViewPlugin + Decoration.replace/mark + atomicRanges), `cm-mention-widget.ts` (`MentionWidget`, renders `${prefix}${clipDisplayName(displayName)}`), `mention-finder.ts` (`findMentionsInText(text, prefix, slugs)` — literal prefix+slug match against a known-slug list), `mention-meta.ts`.
 - The editable task description mounts at `components/fields/registrations/markdown.tsx` via `useMentionExtensions()` (no opts); read-only display at `fields/displays/markdown-display.tsx`. Today the task metaMap there is title-slug-keyed, so inline `^` task pills don't resolve.

 ## Scope
-- Match `^` references by SHAPE, not by enumerating a slug list: `^` followed by exactly 26 OR exactly 7 Crockford-base32 chars, longest-first (26 before 7), with the existing boundary guards (`[\w-]` neighbors) and fenced-code/inline-code/heading skips. Verify these hold for fixed-width ids.
-- Normalize a matched 26-char full ULID to its last-7 short id, then resolve against the single short-id-keyed task metaMap (from short-ids-mention-identity). This keeps the metaMap keyed only by short id while accepting both widths — no doubling.
-- `MentionWidget` renders the pill as `^<short>` + task title for BOTH input forms (a pasted full ULID displays as the short pill). Unknown id (shape matches, resolution misses) falls back to muted raw text (existing behavior), no crash.
-- Feed the short-id-keyed task metaMap into the description editor + read-only display.
-- Confirm `depends_on` field pills still render and now display `^<short>` consistently.

+- Ensure `findMentionsInText` matches a fixed-width Crockford-base32 short id after `^` (verify the boundary regex `[\w-]` and the fenced-code/inline-code/heading skips hold for a 7-char id).
+- `MentionWidget` resolves short id → task title for the pill label; unknown short id falls back to muted raw text (existing behavior).
+- Confirm `depends_on` field pills (already id-resolved via `MentionView`) still render and, ideally, now display `^<short>` consistently.

 ## Acceptance
-- Typing/pasting `^8rfp1r` OR `^01KT4CNAYW7JG0X8F8W28RFP1R` in a task description renders a pill showing the task's title, displayed as `^<short>`; caret-adjacent reverts to the raw editable token.
-- Read-only markdown display renders the same pill for both forms.
-- Unknown id (right shape, no match) shows muted raw text, no crash.
+- Typing/pasting `^8rfp1r` in a task description renders a pill showing the task's title; caret-adjacent reverts to raw editable `^8rfp1r`.
+- Read-only markdown display renders the same pill.
+- Unknown short id shows muted raw text, no crash.

forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -8,23 +8,27 @@
 project: short-ids
 title: 'Short IDs: CM6 — render ^<short> in bodies as task pills'
 ---
-Parse `^`-references inside CM6 editor/display bodies and decorate them as task pills showing the task title (clipped), reusing the existing generic pill renderer. Resolves BOTH short (`^8rfp1r`) and full-ULID (`^01KT4CNAYW7JG0X8F8W28RFP1R`) forms; display normalizes both to `^<short>`.
+Parse `^`-references inside CM6 editor/display bodies and decorate them as task pills. The pill LABEL is the short form `^<short>`; the task TITLE shows in the pill's hover tooltip. Resolves BOTH short (`^8rfp1r`) and full-ULID (`^01KT4CNAYW7JG0X8F8W28RFP1R`) forms; both display as the same `^<short>` pill.

+## Intentional asymmetry
+Unlike `#tag`/`@actor`/`$project` pills (which show the entity NAME as the label), a `^task` pill shows the short ID as the label and puts the title in the tooltip — task titles are long sentence-like strings, not short handles. Do not "fix" this to show the title inline.
+
 ## Background (from scoping)
-- Generic pill stack already exists and is prefix-parameterized: `cm-mention-decorations.ts` (ViewPlugin + Decoration.replace/mark + atomicRanges), `cm-mention-widget.ts` (`MentionWidget`, renders `${prefix}${clipDisplayName(displayName)}`), `mention-finder.ts` (`findMentionsInText(text, prefix, slugs)` — literal prefix+slug match against a known-slug list), `mention-meta.ts`.
-- The editable task description mounts at `components/fields/registrations/markdown.tsx` via `useMentionExtensions()` (no opts); read-only display at `fields/displays/markdown-display.tsx`. Today the task metaMap there is title-slug-keyed, so inline `^` task pills don't resolve.
-- `depends_on` (full ULIDs) already renders as pills via `MentionView` — inline body matching must stay consistent with it.
+- Generic pill stack exists and is prefix-parameterized: `cm-mention-decorations.ts` (ViewPlugin + Decoration.replace/mark + atomicRanges), `cm-mention-widget.ts` (`MentionWidget`, renders `${prefix}${clipDisplayName(displayName)}`), `mention-finder.ts` (`findMentionsInText`), `mention-meta.ts` (`MentionMeta { color, displayName, description }`), plus an existing tooltip path.
+- Editable task description mounts at `components/fields/registrations/markdown.tsx`; read-only display at `fields/displays/markdown-display.tsx`.
+- `depends_on` (full ULIDs) already renders as pills via `MentionView` — keep consistent.

 ## Scope
-- Match `^` references by SHAPE, not by enumerating a slug list: `^` followed by exactly 26 OR exactly 7 Crockford-base32 chars, longest-first (26 before 7), with the existing boundary guards (`[\w-]` neighbors) and fenced-code/inline-code/heading skips. Verify these hold for fixed-width ids.
-- Normalize a matched 26-char full ULID to its last-7 short id, then resolve against the single short-id-keyed task metaMap (from short-ids-mention-identity). This keeps the metaMap keyed only by short id while accepting both widths — no doubling.
-- `MentionWidget` renders the pill as `^<short>` + task title for BOTH input forms (a pasted full ULID displays as the short pill). Unknown id (shape matches, resolution misses) falls back to muted raw text (existing behavior), no crash.
+- Match `^` references by SHAPE, not by enumerating a slug list: `^` + exactly 26 OR exactly 7 Crockford-base32 chars, longest-first (26 before 7), with existing boundary guards (`[\w-]` neighbors) and fenced-code/inline-code/heading skips.
+- Normalize a matched full ULID to its last-7, resolve against the single short-id-keyed task metaMap (from short-ids-mention-identity).
+- Pill rendering for tasks: LABEL = `^<short>`, TOOLTIP = title. Likely mapping: for the task metaMap set displayName = short id (so the generic widget labels the pill `^<short>`) and description = title (so the existing tooltip path shows the title). Confirm/route the tooltip to the title.
+- Unknown id (shape matches, resolution misses) → muted raw text (existing behavior), no crash.
 - Feed the short-id-keyed task metaMap into the description editor + read-only display.
-- Confirm `depends_on` field pills still render and now display `^<short>` consistently.
+- Confirm `depends_on` field pills still render and now display `^<short>` with title tooltip.

 ## Acceptance
-- Typing/pasting `^8rfp1r` OR `^01KT4CNAYW7JG0X8F8W28RFP1R` in a task description renders a pill showing the task's title, displayed as `^<short>`; caret-adjacent reverts to the raw editable token.
-- Read-only markdown display renders the same pill for both forms.
-- Unknown id (right shape, no match) shows muted raw text, no crash.
+- Typing/pasting `^8rfp1r` OR `^01KT4CNAYW7JG0X8F8W28RFP1R` in a description renders a `^<short>` pill; hovering shows the task title.
+- Read-only markdown display renders the same pill + tooltip for both forms.
+- Caret-adjacent reverts to the raw editable token; unknown id shows muted raw text, no crash.

 Depends on short-ids-mention-identity.
\ No newline at end of file
